articles.title: The deadly Ebola outbreak is proving difficult to control
articles.description: The alert was raised on May 5. Four health-care workers in the Ituri Province of the Democratic Republic of the Congo had died from an unknown illness within four days. articles.title: How a new extraction process could unlock the world’s lithium
articles.description: Researchers say they’ve found a new way to extract lithium, a crucial metal used in the lithium-ion batteries that power electric vehicles and energy storage arrays.
